title: CodeGrind City Map Updates: District 01 Gets Smarter
summary: Highlighting recent District 01 map and scene enhancements that improve mobile visibility and walking interactions in CodeGrind.
core_message: We’ve shipped CityMap and CityScene improvements for District 01, including mobile shell visibility management and smoother walking interactions, plus tighter integration with the CodeGrind UI. This keeps players engaged with clearer navigation and responsive scenes as they practice DSA within the platform.
cta: Explore the updated District 01 map and share your experience with the new mobile-friendly interactions.
visual_brief: Static UI update: District 01 map and CityScene components with improved mobile visibility controls, new walkway interactions, cyberpunk aesthetic cues, clean captions overlay describing changes

media.selection_reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.
